situation_summary.primary_threat_axis: North-to-south along the Arktholm corridor. Two fast movers on converging headings from NW and NE, with a slow UAV on the western flank.

track_breakdown.notes: Highest threat. Direct heading toward capital corridor. Confidence 0.85.
Second fighter on parallel southern heading. Confidence 0.78. Potential pincer formation with trk-h01.
Slow UAV. Low confidence 0.58. Possible recon or decoy. Not an immediate engagement priority.

anomalies: Two fighter-type tracks on converging headings suggest coordinated attack, but no confirmed raid association yet.
UAV track on western flank may be forward recon for a follow-on wave.
situation_summary.confidence_assessment: Moderate confidence in threat picture. Primary axis toward Arktholm is clear. Eastern and western flanks remain uncertain.

narration: Two fast movers detected heading south toward the Arktholm defence zone — one from the northwest at high confidence, one from the northeast at moderate confidence. Their converging headings suggest a coordinated approach. A slow-moving UAV on the western flank is likely recon or a decoy. Estimated time to the capital zone is 90 seconds for the lead track. Recommend generating courses of action.
